Video.summary: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: HOLLYWOOD - Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: HOLLYWOOD - Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: HOLLYWOOD - Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb
KARATE COMBAT: HOLLYWOOD - Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb
KARATE COMBAT: HOLLYWOOD - Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb

Video.summary: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Achraf Ouchen vs. Elhadji Ndour
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Achraf Ouchen vs. Elhadji Ndour

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Achraf Ouchen vs. Elhadji Ndour
KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Achraf Ouchen vs. Elhadji Ndour
KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Achraf Ouchen vs. Elhadji Ndour

Video.summary: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features Jaclyn Madarasz as we delve into the life of a coach.
Video.grandparentTitle: Day in the Life of a Coach - Jaclyn Madarasz
Video.title: Day in the Life of a Coach - Jaclyn Madarasz

Image.alt: Day in the Life of a Coach - Jaclyn Madarasz
Day in the Life of a Coach - Jaclyn Madarasz
Day in the Life of a Coach - Jaclyn Madarasz

Video.summary: Former UFC fighter Rodney Wallace steps into the cage at HK36 to challenge Ariel Gandulla. Both fighters possess high level wrestling skills, making it a tough bout to call!

Video.title: Out of the Cage - Rodney Wallace

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Rodney Wallace
Out of the Cage - Rodney Wallace
Out of the Cage - Rodney Wallace

Video.summary: After an epic first fight, John Woo checks in with Dr. Murray Heber to make sure he did not sustrain any serious injuries. Jordan Van Heek learns about the endorphin rush he experienced in his fight.

Video.title: After The Fight - John Woo/Jordan Van Heek
